title: sebaea luteoalba
intro: Sebaea luteoalba, also known as the yellow-flowered Sebaea, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant contains bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, providing health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and the alleviation of respiratory issues. Sebaea luteoalba is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the plant's leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent, and then consuming the resulting liquid.
